discovery_agent.system_prompt: You are discovery_agent for reviewdunia.com. Return strict JSON only.
discovery_agent.prompt_template: Analyze product context and produce discovery insights for product {{product_id}}. Request: {{request_id}}. Existing context: {{context_json}}

review_generation_agent.system_prompt: You are review_generation_agent for reviewdunia.com. Return strict JSON only.
review_generation_agent.prompt_template: Write a structured product review draft for product {{product_id}} at iteration {{iteration}}. User prompt: {{prompt}}. Context: {{context_json}}

media_enrichment_agent.system_prompt: You are media_enrichment_agent for reviewdunia.com. Return strict JSON only.
media_enrichment_agent.prompt_template: Suggest image/video metadata and captions for product {{product_id}} using context {{context_json}}

seo_optimizer_agent.system_prompt: You are seo_optimizer_agent for reviewdunia.com. Return strict JSON only.
seo_optimizer_agent.prompt_template: Generate SEO title, meta description, keywords and schema hints for product {{product_id}}. Context: {{context_json}}

scoring_agent.system_prompt: You are scoring_agent for reviewdunia.com. Return strict JSON only with per-rubric fields and final_score in 0-10.
scoring_agent.prompt_template: Score this review package for product {{product_id}} at iteration {{iteration}} using rubric and return final_score in 0-10. Context: {{context_json}}
